extra.reason: Start gate released; execution begun
Added valid skill-authoring frontmatter (name/description with TRIGGER+SKIP/user-invocable/skill-group/depends-on-tool/allowed-tools; composites get depends-on-skill) to all 9 skills; YAML validated
Confirmed local-only: no Dolt remotes, no remote refs in config.yaml/metadata.json. Recorded intent via bd config set dolt.local-only=true

Token-efficiency pass: removed the redundant per-skill 'command -v naba' validate ritual (now covered by depends-on-tool frontmatter + installer warning) and renumbered workflows. Substantive guidance kept embedded per Decision 6.
Added concise per-skill README.md (description, usage, prerequisites, install note) to all 9 skills
Epic 1 complete: frontmatter + token-trim + per-skill READMEs for all 9 skills
Renamed 9 skill dirs to naba-* (git mv), updated name: fields and self-referencing slash commands; naba CLI subcommands preserved
Updated cross-skill slash refs, depends-on-skill arrays ([naba-*]), and prose skill-name references; fixed one prose-slash corruption; frontmatter validated

Verified no existing docs enumerate skill slash-commands or the plugin (README/CLAUDE describe the CLI binary; PRD refs are CLI subcommands/Go files, correctly unchanged). Skill install docs + breaking slash-command note are net-new in issue 3.5.
Epic 2 complete: 9 skills renamed to naba-* (dirs, name fields, slash commands, cross-refs, depends-on-skill); no stale doc refs

Audit: naba_image_assistant = pure routing + per-command guidance, fully covered by the 9 individual skills' TRIGGER/SKIP descriptions. naba_batch_processor: brand-kit/storyboard already covered; its UNIQUE icon-suite + asset-pipeline batch patterns folded into a new naba-batch skill (10th skill). agents/ now safe to delete in 3.4.

Authored frontmatter-driven install.py (adapted from beads-skills): scope/surface/target resolution, depends-on-skill closure, depends-on-tool PATH check, rsync install, --dry-run/--list-groups/--strict/--force, net-new --uninstall (removes only naba skills; rules kept unless --force), MIT header. Smoke-tested: lists 10 skills in group naba.
Authored install.sh thin wrapper (uv-on-PATH guard, exec uv run install.py); MIT header; smoke-tested
Deleted .claude-plugin/ (plugin.json, marketplace.json) and agents/ (both files) via git rm

Added 'Claude Code Skills' README section (installer usage with scope/surface/dry-run/uninstall flags, naba-binary prerequisite + inert-warning note, all 10 /naba-* commands, breaking namespacing note). LICENSE verified: MIT/James Dixson/Yoshiko Studios LLC/2026. CLAUDE.md has no plugin-delivery refs.

Verified: --dry-run lists 10 naba-* skills (no change); real install to throwaway target lands all 10 intact; NO rules/ dir created; frontmatter name yields /naba-* commands; no stale/old command names; --uninstall removes only naba-* (unrelated skill survived); clean removal.
Epic 3 complete: install.{sh,py} authored + verified, .claude-plugin/ and agents/ deleted, batch capability preserved as naba-batch skill, README install docs added

Hygiene resolved: bd hooks install --force (5 hooks updated), DB metadata version updated (bd migrate), added missing .beads/.gitignore + project .gitignore patterns (doctor gitignore warnings cleared), generated .beads/issues.jsonl (28 records, tracked-eligible). Doctor: 73 passed, 0 errors.

Configured GitHub upstream via bd config (github.owner=dixson3, github.repo=naba, custom.upstream.enabled=true, custom.upstream.backend=github, dolt.local-only=true). gh auth active; bd github status = Configured. No bulk import (no upstream issues). No CLAUDE.md section written (init is config-only).
roundtrip ok

bd doctor: 0 errors. Non-transient warnings: Remote Consistency (ACCEPTED by design — local-only, resolving it would add a Dolt remote violating Decision 4) and Agent Doc Divergence (handled in Epic 5.1). Transient (clear at commit): Dolt Status, Git Working Tree. JSONL/DB round-trip verified (create->export->find->close).

Epic 4 complete: local-only Dolt confirmed (no remote, dolt.local-only=true), hygiene fixed (hooks/gitignore/metadata), issues.jsonl tracked, GitHub upstream configured (dixson3/naba), doctor 0 errors

Reconciled project-root docs (ordered per C6): bd setup codex refreshed AGENTS.md managed block; made AGENTS.md the comprehensive primary (merged naba dev guide + agent ops + local-only beads note, fixed stale bd dolt push); CLAUDE.md thinned to @AGENTS.md with bd-doctor-divergence:ok marker. Agent Doc Divergence warning resolved; doctor 0 errors.

Bootstrapped DRIFT-CHECK.md (approved: no): 6 nodes (skill-md, frontmatter-contract, skill-readme, installer, project-readme, cli-source), 7 edges incl. naba-specific e-cli-subcommand (skill naba <sub> -> internal/cli/*.go), trigger globs, fixed-authority policy. Awaiting operator approval (capability gate naba-mol-9zz.6).

drift-check verification (isolated report-only agent) over all 7 edges: 7/7 PASS, 0 FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE/CONFLICT. Skill set (10), README index (10 rows), CLI cobra commands (7 subs), installer frontmatter discovery, depends-on-skill resolution all consistent. README usage flag-subset note is within the section-present contract (PASS).
Epic 5 complete: project-root docs reconciled (5.1), DRIFT-CHECK.md bootstrapped + operator-approved (5.2), drift-check passed 7/7 (5.3)
